content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_POCharges
-- drop view BI_POCharges

AS

SELECT 
    C.PUNO AS [PO Number],
    C.PNLI AS [PO Line],
    C.PNLS AS [PO Line Subnumber],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    H.ORTY AS [Order Type],
    H.RGDT AS [Order Entry Date],
    C.CDSE AS [Sequence Number],
    C.EXTY AS [Charge Type],
    C.CEID AS [Costing Element],
    C.EXIC AS [Charge Invoicing],
    C.WSOP AS [Costing Operator],
    C.CEVA AS [Costing Element Amount],
    C.CEVJ AS [Adjusted Costing Element Amount],
    C.ACIN AS [Acc Invoiced],
    C.IVCQ AS [Invoice Charge Quantity],
    C.THPR AS [3rd Party Charges],
    C.POOV AS [Markup],
    C.OVHE AS [Costing Markup],
    C.RGDT AS [Entry Date],
    C.LMDT AS [Change Date],
    C.CHID AS [Changed by]
FROM M3.MPOEXP C
LEFT JOIN M3.MPLINE L ON C.PUNO = L.PUNO AND C.PNLI = L.PNLI AND C.PNLS = L.PNLS
LEFT JOIN M3.MPHEAD H ON C.PUNO = H.PUNO
WHERE C.PNLI <> '0'
